<!-- source-snippet repo="cn-quickstart" path="sdk/docs/sharable/sdk/quickstart/operate/json-api.rst" commit="5327209dd3223f985ed91803787e3b18c8ad77cb" snippet="cn-quickstart-rst-code-sdk-docs-sharable-sdk-quickstart-operate-json-api-bash-192" location="lines:192-196" -->
```bash
   DSO_PARTY=$(curl -s "http://localhost:2975/v2/parties" \
     -H "Authorization: Bearer $USER_ADMIN_TOKEN" | \
     jq -r '.partyDetails[] | select(.party | startswith("DSO::")) | .party')
   echo "DSO Party: $DSO_PARTY"

```
